text: Bracket re-fab thermal: peak temp under load 76°C, margin 9°C to spec. ECO-178 verified. Closing the thermal lane for DVT.
BMS hysteresis PR #221 cleared chamber sweep. Merging.

Gripper resonance characterisation: third harmonic centred at 4150 RPM. Outside our normal operating envelope (4500-6500) but accessible during ramp. Two mitigations: stiffen the lower arm link by 0.6mm wall, or a firmware skip-band.
Firmware skip-band is reversible and ships in days. Mechanical change locks PVT tooling. Suggest firmware first, mechanical evaluated for next revision.
Will implement a 4050-4250 RPM skip-band in the motor controller. Small power-up cost. Patch by Monday.
DVT exit posture: thermal closed, extrusion sourcing closed, firmware closed, BMS hysteresis closed, gripper resonance mitigated firmware-side. Recommend DVT exit review proceeds Friday.
PVT planning note: AlumWest pricing premium (18%) should be absorbed in PVT cost ladder. Will surface during PVT cost review. ExtruCo expected resumption mid-July — not on critical path.
Risk surfaced for PVT: AL-7075-T6 brackets need a finishing pass we don't currently have in line. Need to evaluate adding the operation or qualifying a finishing vendor before PVT kickoff.
